plugins.name: github-pr-toolkit
plugins.description: Pull-request toolkit — /resolve-pr-comments resolves the review threads reviewers opened; /code-critic authors an adversarial review of a local diff or a GitHub PR. A high-reasoning orchestrator delegates all GitHub and outbound-git work to Haiku workers over GitHub's hosted MCP server; one PAT config covers both commands. Replaces the former resolve-pr-comments and code-critic plugins.
